data.name: 驅魔少女夏洛特
data.detailed_description:
＜故事梗概＞
扮成普通人生活的近衛瑞樹的真面目其實是，
憑藉從雙親那裡繼承的2件聖裝備驅除惡魔的“驅魔少女”夏洛特。

聽說了有惡魔出沒的傳聞，為了救出半開玩笑地迷失在廢棄工廠裡的朋友，
夏洛特的真面目即將揭曉...！

＜系統＞
戰鬥採用單純的回合制RPG模式。
運用為了驅除惡魔的2件聖裝備，劍裝備”天平“與槍裝備”天蠍“，
與徘徊在廢棄工廠的敵人戰鬥吧！

使用擊倒敵人可獲得的”能量水晶“來強化聖裝備，可以將推進戰鬥向有利方向發展。

靈活運用從敵方回收或是拾取的材料，可以製作出對於戰鬥和恢復有幫助的道具。
製作特殊的彈藥，攻擊敵人的弱點也許可以造成巨大傷害...！？

闖過潛藏在廢棄工廠的惡魔的層層陷阱，
夏洛特他們能夠平安脫身嗎...！？

data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 俄文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/10/11 (32bit/64bit)
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Exorcist Charlotte
data.detailed_description:
*All characters in this game are 18 or older


◇Plot◇
Mizuki Konoe was no ordinary girl. Also known as Charlotte,
she was an "Exorcist Girl", who fights devils with the 2 holy gears handed down to her by her parents.

Her classmates headed to an abandoned factory after hearing rumors about the devil...
In order to save their lives, Charlotte shows her true form...!


◆System◆
Simple turn-based RPG combat.
Use the 2 holy gears, the "Libra" sword and the "Skorpius" gun
to defeat enemies in the abandoned factory!

Beat enemies and collect the "Energy crystal" to power up your gear to gain an edge.

Get materials from enemies and around the map to craft useful items for your adventure.
Create special bullets to gain an edge over the enemies...!!

Beware of the devil's traps!
Charlotte's fate is in your hands...

data.short_description: Mizuki Konoe, also known as Exorcist Charlotte, lived among others using a disguise. Explore an abandoned factor and fight off the devils! Exorcist heroine RPG!!
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Traditional Chinese
